special_mechanics.name: Object Carrying
special_mechanics.description: Players carry objects (animals in Noah's Ark, Moses in Baby Moses) across levels, similar to Super Mario Bros. 2 mechanics

special_mechanics.name: Projectile Throwing
special_mechanics.description: Objects can be thrown without damage (e.g., Moses thrown in Baby Moses)

special_mechanics.name: Stunning Mechanic
special_mechanics.description: Acorns and barrel-like objects used to stun enemies/animals

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/qualitative data only. No precise physics parameters documented in available sources. Game described as derivative of Super Mario Bros. 2 with similar sidescroller mechanics, but no specific movement, gravity, or jump physics values available.
